name: All-Purpose Marinade (Moore)
recipeIngredient: 2 thin slices lemon peel, or more
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a nonreactive bowl.
2. Use the marinade immediately on the meat or store it in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
COOKS NOTES: Moore marinades beef brisket for up to 24 hours before cooking. This marinade is versatile and can be used for chicken, beef, and pork. The primary purposes of a marinade are to cleanse and open the meat's pores to absorb flavors and to tenderize the meat by breaking down connective tissues through citric juices.
